description: Developed and maintained 10+ user-facing features and UI enhancements using Vue.js for a high-traffic digital wallet application used by millions of users, with strong focus on performance and reliability. Owned and implemented end-to-end payment flow UI, integrating frontend components with backend APIs to ensure seamless data-driven interactions, proper loading states, error handling, and consistent transaction states across the user journey. Collaborated closely with designers and backend engineers to deliver accurate, reusable, and maintainable components, improving development efficiency and ensuring a consistent user experience across releases.

Assisted in 3+ computer science and programming courses, supporting 50+ students per semester in web development fundamentals, JavaScript logic, and structured problem-solving. Reviewed and evaluated 100+ student code submissions, providing actionable feedback on correctness, readability, and best practices, helping improve code quality and assignment completion rates. Guided students through debugging and technical concepts during lab sessions, enabling faster issue resolution and strengthening students’ understanding of core programming principles.
